complete_list.task: Complete broken internal link fixes (63 remaining)
Fix duplicate title tags (8 pages) + prevention checklist
Add missing H1 tags (10 pages) + content standards
Core Web Vitals audit and initial optimization

deployments.title: Phantom slug 301s in .htaccess
deployments.detail: 10 commonly-searched-but-missing slugs (mt4-trading-platform, cfd-trading, etc.) now redirect to real pages so ranking signals land correctly.

deployments.title: Duplicate title tags fixed
deployments.detail: 8 pages had identical titles; each now has a unique, descriptive title tag.

deployments.title: Missing H1 tags added
deployments.detail: 10 pages were missing H1 headings; each got a single, keyword-aligned H1.

deployments.title: Meta descriptions completed
deployments.detail: 11 pages had no meta description; each now has a 140-160 char CTR-optimized description.

deployments.title: 63 internal broken links repaired
deployments.detail: Audit found 63 internal links pointing at 404s — all updated to live URLs.

deployments.title: robots.txt formatting fix
deployments.detail: Removed malformed directives, added proper Sitemap line.

complete_list.task: Write SEO article #1 targeting commercial keywords
Write SEO article #2 targeting commercial keywords

open_list.task: Continue Core Web Vitals fixes (JS/CSS optimization)
Content expansion for thin pages (low text-to-HTML)

deployments.title: Hreflang on all 3 installs
deployments.detail: EN /, AR /ar, FA /fa each emit proper hreflang annotations via child-theme functions.php. Resolves the multilingual indexing fragmentation that was costing rankings.

deployments.title: Enriched Organization + FinancialService schema
deployments.detail: Yoast graph filter extended with sameAs (7 socials), 5 contactPoint entries, 3 regulatory credentials (FSC GB19024331, SVG 3060 LLC 2023, Saint Lucia 2023-00661). Stronger E-E-A-T signals.

deployments.title: Backlink audit + disavow (Task #23)
deployments.detail: Pulled 430+ backlinks from Semrush, tested every target URL, generated 54 new disavow entries, merged with existing 532 → 586 spam domains submitted to Google. Toxic link drag stops.

deployments.title: FAQ schema on 11 commercial pages (Task #18)
deployments.detail: 76 Q&As pulled from existing visible accordion content, wrapped in FAQPage JSON-LD via child theme. Schema matches on-page content per Google's same-content rule. AI Overviews and rich-result eligibility unlocked.

deployments.title: Top SEO article #1 published
deployments.detail: Commercial-intent article targeting a Tier 1 keyword cluster. Internal links connected.

deployments.title: Top SEO article #2 published
deployments.detail: Second commercial-intent article. Linked from related-topic pages.

deployments.title: 301 recovery for broken backlink targets
deployments.detail: 40 backlinks pointed at 404 URLs. Created 18 redirect rules via Redirection plugin to recover their equity.

deployments.title: Phantom 301 verification
deployments.detail: All 10 phantom redirects re-tested live and confirmed firing — they survived two month-end cache rebuilds.

timeline.label: Schema recrawl
timeline.detail: Google fetches updated structured data on its next crawl of each page. New FAQ markup, hreflang, and Organization schema start being read into the index. No ranking shift yet — Google just reading the new signals.

timeline.label: Indexing settles
timeline.detail: Pages with new content (the 2 new articles, expanded thin pages) finish indexing. Hreflang clusters get recognized — Google stops treating EN/AR/FA versions as competing for the same query.

timeline.label: First ranking lifts
timeline.detail: Disavow file gets processed in Google's algorithmic review. Toxic link drag releases. Phantom 301s consolidate their parent pages' equity. Expect movement on the 27 keywords currently outside top 20.

timeline.label: Compounding effect
timeline.detail: Schema rich results start appearing in SERPs (FAQ accordions under listings, Organization knowledge panel). Click-through-rate lifts feed back into rankings. Authority Score expected to move from 27 toward 30+.
